SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.service.session

Class SinglePlayerGameSession

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.service.session.SinglePlayerGameSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameStateContext, GameSession
public class SinglePlayerGameSession extends Object implements GameSession
Single-player session encapsulating board lifecycle and state transitions (Service Layer). Keeps GameController focused on UI/input delegation.
Author:
Dong, Jia.
